identity_provider.description: The identity provider the plugin will interact with to carry our the OpenId Connect auth code flow

use_internet.description: Determines whether the JWKS endpoints for your IDP will be internet facing

additional_scopes.description: Additional scopes to request from the authorization endpoint

audience_required.description: The audience required to be present in the access token (or introspection results) for successful authorization.

authorization_cookie_name.description: Specifies authorisation cookie name. This is necessary when same instance of Kong is used to protect multiple upstream services with different client ids.

client_id.description: Reference to the client id env var in the gateway, refer to gateway module for details

redirect_uri.description: The redirect URI passed to the authorization and token endpoints

uplift.description: Uplift configuration to allow moving from a lower `confidence_level` to a higher one

redirect_uri.description: Gateway URI to redirect the user to for uplift. If omitted then redirect will default to the route’s host, path and any query args will be maintained

leeway.description: Defines leeway time (in seconds) when validating: time authentication occurred (auth_time), expiration time after which the token must not be accepted (exp), time at which the JWT was issued (iat) and not before claim which specifies time before which token must not be accepted (nbf).

logout.description: If true, this route will not forward to the upstream application. Instead, it will end the user's session and redirect to the IDP's logout URI. The IDP's logout URI will then redirect to the application's logout confirmation page, which should have a different path than the logout path, for example, /logout and /signed-out.

logout_redirect_uri.description: Where to redirect the client on logout

post_logout_redirect_uri.description: Where to redirect the client on logout (for RP Initiated Logout)

logout_revoke.description: If true, the plugin will attempt to revoke the token before redirecting to the IDP's logout URI

logout_uri_suffix.description: The request URI suffix that activates the logout process

logout_methods.description: The request methods that can activate the logout process

logout_query_arg.description: The query argument that activates the logout process

unauthorized_redirect_uri.description: Where to redirect the client on unauthorized requests

forbidden_redirect_uri.description: Where to redirect the client on forbidden requests

unexpected_redirect_uri.description: Where to redirect the client when unexpected errors happen with the requests

groups_required.description: The groups required to be present in the access token (or introspection results) for successful authorization.

preserve_query_args.description: Whether to preserve query arguments even when doing authorization code flow

cookie_idletime.description: The session cookie idle time in seconds

cookie_renew.description: The number of seconds prior to the `session_cookie_lifetime` that the session cookie will be renewed

cookie_lifetime.description: The session cookie lifetime in seconds. Defaults is 1800 seconds (30 minutes)

client_secret.title: Client secrets
client_secret.description: Reference to the client secret env var in the gateway, refer to gateway module for details

confidence_level.title: Confidence level
confidence_level.description: Extra query argument values passed to the authorization endpoint

http_proxy.title: HTTP proxy URL
http_proxy.description: The URL of the HTTP proxy to use for outgoing requests

https_proxy.title: HTTPS proxy URL
https_proxy.description: The URL of the HTTPS proxy to use for outgoing requests

forward_query_args.description: Extra query arguments passed from the client to the authorization endpoint.

ui_locales.title: UI Locales
ui_locales.description: ui_locales URL query-parameter value(s) to pass to the logout endpoint

identity_provider.description: Confidence level is not supported for NHS providers

client_id.description: client_id cannot be a vault reference when logout is true
